verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I don’t wonna be free Lord, from the task that you gave me, I don’t wonna be free Lord, from the load I am to share, This weight may be heavy, but its a privilege to bear it, I’m a prisoner of love now and I don’t wonna be free.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I’m a man born free, I may climb to the highest, As a man born free, I may climb to the depths But the choice is for me, just where I will wander But from your guiding hand Lord I don’t wonna be free.
